_comment: Which regions road_segments covers — the loader's input. Config, not code: widening coverage
is an edit here plus a loader re-run, never a schema, ingest or scoring change (geography is
Boxes are [south_lat, west_lon, north_lat, east_lon]. These are generous starting rectangles,
not surveyed bounds — verify/tighten before a real load.
All boxes fall INSIDE the already-built norcal Valhalla tiles, so map-matching needs no rebuild;
this loader is the only thing that changes when the list does.
Scope caution: loading a box PROVISIONS coverage, it doesn't populate it. M1's feasibility
depends on density, which comes from concentrating driving (SF), not scattering thin miles.
